_comment: Addresses to exclude from 'orphan on-chain user' (Category U-F) checks. Documented in findings/2026-04-17-phase0-phase1a.md. Lowercased.
_added_2026_04_18: Added 42 pre-launch / testing addresses from U-F audit finding. See specs/009-100-sync-audit/execution-log/. 4 had active on-chain loans at audit time — 'uf-active-pre-launch' label flags them for future review.
_added_2026_04_27: Added 3 'uf-pre-launch-with-db-row' wallets (0x663dbe..., 0x80925caba..., 0xd15a84ec...). These borrowed pre-launch (2025-12-01/02) AND have a row in users table — registered as users for end-to-end testing. All loans closed. Identified during spec 023 Etapa 1 review.
